message:
chore: add alternate target directories to gitignore

Adds target_dusty/, target_dusty_eagle/, and target-upgrade/ to gitignore.
These are build artifact directories used for cross-compilation experiments
and upgrade testing that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,3 +24,8 @@ perf.data.old
 
 # Diagram images (working artifacts)
 *.jpeg
+
+# Alternate target directories (cross-compilation, experiments)
+target_dusty/
+target_dusty_eagle/
+target-upgrade/
